- NEVER force push or reset branches

5. After each successful merge, notify session 41068b22-2cc6-4f81-b924-b521d2f4b6b3 using: svamp session send 41068b22-2cc6-4f81-b924-b521d2f4b6b3 'PR <number> merged, please pull latest main'

Important notes:
- Work in /Users/weio/workspace/hypha (the main repo, not the worktree)
- Use 'gh pr view', 'gh pr checks', 'gh pr merge' commands
- NEVER force push or reset branches
- Resolve merge conflicts by checking out the PR branch, then git merge origin/main, fixing conflicts, committing, and pushing
- Only merge when CI is green - use 'gh pr checks <number>' to verify
- Skip any PRs that are already merged or closed
- Work sequentially, wait for each merge before proceeding to the next
- When polling CI, check every 60 seconds and show progress
- Use 'gh pr merge <number> --squash --auto' or '--merge' to merge
